title: NOT NULL without phased approach — ADD COLUMN NOT NULL on populated table fails or risks
migration_snippet:
-- V3__add_status.sql
ALTER TABLE orders ADD COLUMN status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL;
expected_feedback: Critical: Adding NOT NULL column without DEFAULT on a populated table. If any existing row has no value for this column, MySQL will either fail the ALTER or assign an implicit default depending on sql_mode. Use phased approach: (1) ADD COLUMN nullable, (2) backfill in PK-range batches, (3) MODIFY to NOT NULL with explicit DEFAULT.
